name: Opor Ayam (Coconut Chicken Curry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into serving portions and rub with salt.
2. Fry onion and garlic in oil until lightly browned. Add coriander, ginger, and lemon grass, stirring well for about 1 minute.
3. Add the chicken, mixing thoroughly to ensure it absorbs the spices. Stir occasionally.
4. Add coconut milk and salam leaf. Cover tightly and cook over medium heat for about 40 minutes.
5. Serve with rice.
